creator: andrey@shidakov.ru
text:
tmux, installed from ports, causes kernel panic. Even runned from user,
not root.

How-To-Repeat: 1. Install from ports tmux (latest version 1.3). 
2. Run: 
$ tmux list-commands 
(konsole hangs)
3. Run in another console 
$ killall -9 tmux

4. System halted with kernel panic.
